notes:
I've designed a curated, Cargo-inspired photography portfolio for you. The layout is built around a journal-like sequence of large, image-led modules that emphasize the photography, with calm Newsreader serif typography and minimal Inter sans-serif captions. 

I've also set up a dedicated design system, "Frame & Sequence," to maintain this minimal and architectural aesthetic across any future screens.

What would you like to see next? I could add a project detail page or an information view.
prompt: Create a Cargo-like photography portfolio template with large image-led modules, calm captions, sparse navigation, and a journal-like sequence that feels curated and minimal.
suggestions: Add a project detail page for 'Abstract Architecture'
Design an info/about page with contact details
Create a grid-based index view for all projects
title: Portfolio Journal View
